Your friend sent you 10.0, but you mentioned the total dinner cost was 12.00. This means your friend should have sent 6.00 (half of 12.00), but they actually sent 10.00, which is 4.00 more than their share.

Let me check your current balance before sending the refund.

I see that your current balance is 1810.0. Since your friend sent 10.0 but should have only sent 6.00 (half of the 12.00 total), they sent 4.00 too much. I'll send this difference back to them.
